Use bcrypt with at least 10 salt rounds for password hashing. Never store plain-text passwords. The compare function handles salt extraction automatically.
Generate two types of tokens: a short-lived access token (1 hour) for API requests and a long-lived refresh token (7 days) for getting new access tokens. Use different secrets for each.
Create an authentication middleware that extracts the token from the Authorization header (Bearer scheme), verifies it with jwt.verify(), and attaches the decoded payload to the request object.
Implement refresh token rotation: when a refresh token is used, invalidate it and issue a brand new pair. Store refresh token IDs in a database or Set to enable revocation on logout.
